title: 1) Age
text:
Age is an essential comparative measure in diagnosis of facial skin condition. Cosmetic
acupuncture is not a reversal of the clock of aging, but following the natural healthy aging
process. Therefore, assessing a patient with the age in mind is essential.
Nobody can ignore the natural aging process; what we are doing is restoring the healthy
aging process. Same wrinkles are interpreted differently by age. Our goal is preventing early
wrinkles and untimely aging. Mid 40s to mid 50s is especially an essential time period
because skin aging is accelerated.
